blocks.text: filed it. Visible presence during the day. Quiet at the edges of the night. The pattern was becoming a shape.

blocks.speaker: Cade Mercer
blocks.content: I need to tell you something.

blocks.speaker: Cade Mercer
blocks.content: Later. I just — I need you to know it's handled. Mostly.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: You can't say something like that and then say later.

blocks.speaker: Cade Mercer
blocks.content: I just did. Tonight. Okay? Tonight.
Wren had been sitting eight feet away the entire time. She hadn't looked at either of them.

blocks.prompt: What does Julian clock about what just happened?

options.label: Cade owes someone something. And Marcus already knows part of it.
Whatever Cade has to say — Marcus won't like it.
Wren heard everything. She changed the subject on purpose.
